notes: v3.0.22 - Real fixes for CHK-182 + CHK-191. CHK-182: dropped the 300ms timer at the boundary check (was expiring during slow corrections). Replaced with one-shot semantic flag - persists until next word boundary regardless of elapsed time. Slow typists now protected; the desijn case (BS through whitespace + retype + space taking 350-500ms) no longer produces desiעם. CHK-191: tray Quit now closes on first click. Fixed the show()-async-vs-popup()-sync race by spawning a thread, sleeping 50ms for shell foreground release, then using app_handle.run_on_main_thread for show+focus+popup. 16/16 unit tests passing (5 new v3.0.22 sequence tests). All 3 QA cycles CLEAR TO SHIP.
